5/10/25
Apnak sob ami valovabi boltace dakhan ami sob sekar korce ja ami abag ar bosha apnar satha onnai korce . Apni e akbar vaban apnar life ta ki ar amar life ta ki . Apnar jonno onak kesu sojjo korce ja kokhono apni bojban na . Apni in future ki ki korta paran amar baba ma auncel sobai sob kesu somporkai amak bolsa . Ar sob sotte o hoisa . Ami o tadar thaka ar kesu lukai nai .tadar sobai ka ak kora bole sob e . Apnar satha amar ki ki hoisa . Tara ja obostai amadar paisa tata tara jana apnar satha amar ki hoisa . Ami bolce ja apnar satha ami pora jogajog korce video call kotha o bolce apnar satha amar physical relation hoisa sob e khula bolce . Tai apni amak asob ar voi dakhayan na tara sob e jana ar amar o asob neya kono voi nai . Apnar satha amar ato kesu hoisa ata janao major cornal doctor ara sobai amak beya korar jonno bosa asa . Ar apni ki akbar nejar dik ta vaban to apnar ki asa ami ki dakha apnar kasa jabo. Amar valo life rakha ami kano akta onerdeto life ar deka jabo . Apnar life ta akata onerdeto life. Apnar life ar kono kesu r e thik nai . Apnar kasa gala ami ki pabo kesu e na .life ta abag deya ae valobasha deya chola na . Apnar kasa gala amar pora sona hoba na apnak neya kotha o jata parbo na apnar kasa gala sobar satha sob somporko nosto korta hoba . To ami kano ato kesu sacrifice korbo keshar jonno korbo . Apni just 6 pas akta chala kono joggota nai akta valo kaj korar low taipar kaj korar oveggota asa sudu apnar . Ar asob a amar somossa hoi .mot kotha ami kono vabai apnar kasa thakta parbo na . Ki dakha apnar kasa ami thakbo apni e bolan ki asa apnar amar onnno karo satha beya hola Sa o amak valobasba to ami kano apnar kasa jabo sob tag kora8:22 PM
